2 .【招生计划】该校在重庆市物理类招生计划2021–2024年均为18人，2025年增至26人；2026年计划25人，较2025年小幅缩招约3.8%，对竞争略有缓解但幅度有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第56名，近年排名稳定在前60，属全国顶尖政法类院校；2026年声誉评价偏负面（历史校园安 全事件），但影响有限；抖音学校热度总排名第6（高热），短视频曝光量极高，反映报考关注度持续升温，可能加剧竞争；法学为A+学科（全国最高等级）， 是该校核心王牌专业，对高分考生吸引力极强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 法学专业社会热度2024年评估为分化观望，但整体仍偏热；工商管理专业明显劝退。重庆市物理类考生20 21年约9.9万→2025年约13.9万，持续增长；2026年总考生约20.9万，按近年比例估算物理类约13.7万，较2025年略减，竞争压力略有缓和。；中国政法大学位于北京，非重庆本地高校；该校在重庆招生占比约2.5%（2025年），属外省招生，无显著地域偏好影响。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续大幅后移 趋势、2026年计划小幅缩招、抖音高热反映关注度上升及物理类考生略减等因素，在2025年基准8129名基础上预计竞争仍趋激烈但略有放缓；预测最低位次约7961名，区间7461–8 461名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text:
From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category dropped from approximately 2930 to 3228 to 5212 to 6722 to 8129, showing a continuous and significant backward trend. In the past 3 years, the cumulative backward shift is about 4900 places, with the 2025 baseline at about 8129 places, indicating a year-on-year intensification of competition.
2. [Enrollment Plan] The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Chongqing was 18 students from 2021 to 2024, increased to 26 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 25 students, a slight reduction of about 3.8% compared to 2025, which slightly eases competition but to a limited extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 56th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, stable in the top 60 in recent years, belonging to the top national political science and law institutions; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (historical campus safety incidents), but the impact is limited; Douyin school popularity ranks 6th overall (high heat), with extremely high short video exposure, reflecting increasing attention from applicants, which may intensify competition; Law is an A+ discipline (the highest national level), the core flagship major of the university, strongly attractive to high-scoring students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of the Law major in 2024 is assessed as divided and wait-and-see, but overall still relatively hot; the Business Administration major is clearly discouraged. The number of Physics Category examinees in Chongqing increased from about 99,000 in 2021 to about 139,000 in 2025, continuing to grow; in 2026, total examinees are about 209,000, with Physics Category estimated at about 137,000 based on recent proportions, a slight decrease from 2025, slightly easing competitive pressure. China University of Political Science and Law is located in Beijing, not a local university in Chongqing; the university's enrollment proportion in Chongqing is about 2.5% (2025), belonging to out-of-province enrollment, with no significant regional preference impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous and significant backward trend in historical rankings, the slight reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan, the high Douyin popularity reflecting increased attention, and the slight decrease in Physics Category examinees, competition is expected to remain intense but slightly slower based on the 2025 baseline of 8129 places; the predicted minimum ranking is about 7961 places, with a range of 7461 to 8461 places.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 517 → 559 → 697 → 804 → 863, showing a continuous backward trend. Over the past 3 years, the cumulative backward shift is about 304 places, with the 2025 baseline at approximately 863, indicating a gradual but moderate intensification of competition. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Chongqing was 24 students from 2021 to 2023, increased to 27 in 2024, and significantly increased to 37 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 35 students, a reduction of about 5.4% compared to 2025, which slightly eases competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 56th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, stable among the top 60 in recent years, belonging to the top national political science and law institutions. The 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (historical campus safety incidents), but the impact is limited. Douyin school popularity ranks 6th overall (high heat), with extremely high short video exposure, reflecting increasing attention from applicants, which may intensify competition. Law is an A+ discipline (the highest national level), the core flagship major of the university, strongly attractive to high-scoring liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of the law major in 2024 is assessed as polarized and wait-and-see, but overall still relatively hot. Majors like Network and New Media, Sociology have average popularity. The number of History Category examinees in Chongqing was approximately 83,000 in 2021 → 73,000 in 2025, showing a downward trend. In 2026, total examinees are about 209,000, with an estimated History Category of about 72,000 based on recent proportions, a slight decrease from 2025, slightly easing competitive pressure. China University of Political Science and Law is located in Beijing, not a local university in Chongqing. Its enrollment proportion in Chongqing is about 2.5% (2025), belonging to out-of-province enrollment, with no significant regional preference impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the slight reduction in the 2026 plan, the high Douyin heat reflecting increased attention, and the slight decrease in History Category examinees, competition is expected to be slightly more intense but basically stable based on the 2025 baseline of 863. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 850, with a range of 697–1003.
